ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning algorithm used (e.g., random forest, neural network) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES algorithm_types ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter set */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameters belong to */,
  "colsample_bytree" REAL /* Value of the column sample by tree hyperparameter */,
  "colsample_bylevel" REAL /* Value of the column sample by level hyperparameter */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Value of the learning rate hyperparameter */,
  "n_estimators" INTEGER /* Number of estimators (for ensemble methods) */,
  "max_depth" INTEGER /* Maximum depth of the decision tree */,
  "min_samples_split" INTEGER /* Minimum number of samples required to split an internal node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the performance metrics belong to */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root mean square error (RMSE) of the model */,
  "mape" REAL /* Mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) of the model */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean absolute error (MAE) of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model (for classification) */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model (for classification) */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model (for classification) */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model (for classification) */,
  "r2_score" REAL /* R-squared score of the model (for regression) */,
  "auc_roc" REAL /* AUC-ROC score of the model (for classification) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the model file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the model */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_types" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm type */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)
